title: fix path-dependent init at a drop point (E0309)
statement: This program does not compile: a `drop`-hooked place is initialized on only one path at a scope-exit drop point. Fix the single reported defect so it compiles clean and `main` returns 0. Keep the drop-bearing type.

given_diagnostic.message: place `r` may be initialized here but not on every path reaching this scope exit

notes.message: its type runs drop work, so its drop must be a static fact of this program point, not a runtime decision (§1.6 dual)
initialize it on every path, consume it on every path, or narrow its scope (finding 2026-07-07)
